notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the kernel SRPM in CIQ FIPS Compliant for Rocky Linux 8.10. It addresses 23 CVEs: CVE-2025-21765, CVE-2025-38200, CVE-2025-38461, CVE-2025-38464, CVE-2023-53125, and 18 more.
